_meta.description: Compact NTIPAlias-derived sanity data for cross-checking our D2 1.13c TXT-table indexing (especially the Expansion-row offset). Bound by tests in tests/D2Companion.Tests/ReferenceConsistencyTests.cs.

_runeRangeAssertion: Runes r01..r33 are a contiguous sequential range [610..642] in the Expansion-filtered base-item index. jewel (643) is the next id. This is the anchor that caught the previous Expansion-offset bug where classid 643 wrongly resolved to Jah.
